reasoning: Step 1: Duration of full-stack experience — The candidate has 6+ years of full-stack experience (e.g., Optilyz from 2021–2025, re:cinq from 2025–Present, GISCollective since 2016). This aligns with the job requirement of 6+ years as a Full Stack Engineer.

Step 2: Primary stack match — The candidate has extensive experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and Docker (evident in Optilyz, re:cinq, GISCollective roles). Nest.js is not explicitly mentioned, but Node.js and TypeScript are strongly represented. Vitest is not mentioned, but Jest is mentioned in workshops (testing expertise).
Step 3: Secondary technologies — The candidate has Kotlin/Java experience (e.g., robotic arms project with Java, NI LabWindows/CVI with C/C++). Secondary stack requirement is partially met.

Step 4: Cloud and testing — The candidate has AWS (CDK) and Docker/Kubernetes experience (e.g., GISCollective deployable on Kubernetes, Docker at Altom). Testing frameworks are covered (Selenium course, TDD workshops).
Step 5: AI agent experience — The candidate mentions contributing to AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators, agentic workflows) at re:cinq, which aligns with the secondary requirement.

Step 6: Architecture and scalability — Roles at Sociomantic (micro-services handling millions of HTTP requests/sec), Optilyz (pricing optimization with high-scale systems), and GISCollective (Kubernetes-deployed platform) demonstrate architecture, scalability, and performance experience.

Step 7: Soft skills and collaboration — The candidate has experience with TDD, pair programming, CI/CD, and mentoring (e.g., Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, workshops). Customer-oriented delivery is implied by roles involving user-facing platforms (e.g., GISCollective for NGOs, Apple TV app ranking top 10).
Step 8: Educational background — Bachelor’s in Computer Science (University of Bucharest) meets the core qualification requirement.

Step 9: Gaps — Nest.js is not explicitly mentioned in the resume. Vitest is not mentioned (though Jest is). Kotlin/Java experience is present but not recent (last explicit mention in 2018). Cloud platform coverage is primarily AWS; GCP/Azure are not mentioned.
strengths: 10+ years of full-stack development with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB
Experience with high-scale systems, microservices, and Kubernetes deployments
Proven AI-agent development and architectural contributions in recent roles
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned in the resume or skills list
Vitest not mentioned; Jest expertise is present but alternative frontend testing frameworks are not confirmed
Kotlin/Java experience is older (last explicit use in 2018); cloud platform options beyond AWS are not specified

key_factors.factor: full-stack experience and primary stack match
AI agent development and architecture contributions

response.justification: The candidate has strong full-stack experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and demonstrates deep expertise in scalable architectures and AI-agent development. While there are minor gaps (Nest.js, Vitest, older Kotlin/Java experience), these are not deal-breakers given the breadth of experience and recent work. The overall fit is strong for a Senior Fullstack Developer role.
